author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Creating two design documents from the ferrotorch-design.md braindump: Phase 0 (orchestrator agent) and Phase 1 (autograd engine / ferrotorch-core). User decisions: dynamic-only shapes, own-the-buffer storage, bf16 via ferray-core extension, one doc per phase. ferray-linalg is f64-only — f32 matmul path is an open question.
